title: Vulcan Forged - REKT
relevance_summary: Key compromise leading to theft of tokens and ETH/MATIC from user wallets

prevention.rule: Block any tx that sends funds to known compromised wallet addresses

summary: The attack involved compromising private keys of 96 user addresses, allowing the hacker to drain their contents. A total of over 4.5M PYR was extracted, valued at ~$140M at the time of the attack. A concrete prevention measure would be to block any transaction sending funds to known compromised wallet addresses.
